commit.message:
fix(model-3d): fix split face extrusion and visual artifacts

Three fixes for push-pull after face splitting:
1. Push-pull preview now only moves the selected face's vertices (via
   triangleIndices) instead of all coplanar vertices on the plane
2. Removed computeVertexNormals() after kernel extrude — toBufferGeometry
   already provides correct flat normals; smooth normals caused visible
   triangulation seams
3. Face selection highlight and double-click now use HEMesh-aware face
   detection (buildFaceDataFromHE) instead of coplanar scan, so individual
   split faces are correctly identified

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Working SHM test: sub-microsecond futex-based IPC validated

- fake/shm_test: writer/reader prototype with PxTick over shared memory
  190ns tick latency in release build, futex wake/wait across processes
- Fix SHM header alignment (u64 fields at 8-byte boundaries)
- Update gateway model: daemon owns ports+multiplier, users own client_id
  mkt_data_client_id in prms, separate connect_mkt_data/connect_trading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(model-3d): fix splitFace origins, extrude wall winding, and orphan cleanup

- Fix splitFace: swap split HE origins (endV→startV for face A, startV→endV for face B)
  to prevent duplicate vertices in face loops causing degenerate triangulation
- Fix extrude Case 2/3: remove direction-dependent wall winding ternary, always use
  [oldA, oldB, newB, newA] for consistent twin relationships
- Add detachBoundaryHE for cleaning up orphaned boundary HEs after extrude Case 3
- Unlink boundary HEs from chain before deletion in addFace to prevent stale pointers
- Add stricter validate(): twin origin consistency + duplicate vertex detection

All 64 kernel tests pass.

commit.message:
Initial scaffold: workspace with core, shm, mkt_run, client crates

Workspace structure with src/ (production) and fake/ (prototypes).
- core: InstrumentKey (36-byte fixed), tick types, config loader, dynamic idx tables, multipliers
- shm: mmap regions with futex wake/wait, single-writer ring buffer, multi-reader
- mkt_run: daemon binary loading .prms config, connecting to IB gateways via ibapi sync
- client: user-side library placeholder (no IB dependency)
- fake/tick_encode: working demo of tick encoding
- Zero hardcode: all config via .prms JSON files next to binary

fix: billing summary uses approval-time snapshots, add pay rate versioning

Billing summary endpoints now read from immutable time_entries snapshots
(est_pay_amount, est_bill_amount) instead of recalculating from live
user_pay_rates. Changing a staff member's pay rate no longer retroactively
alters historical billing summaries.

Changes:
- Rewrite GET /api/analytics/billing-summary to aggregate from time_entries
- Rewrite GET /api/analytics/billing-summary/{period_id} likewise
- Add RATE_TYPE_TO_BILLING_SERVICE reverse mapping for time_entry → service type
- Pay rate upsert now inserts new effective-dated rows (preserves history)
- Add audit_log entries for every pay rate change
- Fix approval flow to query latest effective rate per rate_type
- Fix GET /api/payroll/user-pay-rates to deduplicate for multi-row support
- Fix: include exported recipients in billing summary (were being excluded)

Initial commit: S&P Index Lab — full-stack analytics platform

Python analytics backend (OLS regression, variance decomposition, mirror index
construction) + React frontend (Next.js 16, interactive machine-metaphor
visualization with SVG animations, Framer Motion, Recharts).

Key result: 20 stocks explain 94.9% of S&P 500 variance. SP-20 Mirror achieves
15.3% CAGR vs 11.3% — a +4.0% annualized alpha.

fix: Edit sheet shows member preferences for single-member families (#111)

* fix: Edit sheet shows member preferences for single-member families

When a single-member family views the "Everyone" tab and taps Edit on a
food notes card (e.g. Intolerances), the edit sheet now loads the sole
member's preferences instead of the empty "Everyone" preferences. This
fixes chips like "Histamine" not appearing selected despite being shown
on the card.

* fix: セッション初期化を await の前に移動してメンション競合状態を修正

memberJoined イベントが replyText の await 中に session.parents.A を
セットしても、handleJoin 再開後に上書きされてしまう競合状態を修正。

- saveSession(): フェーズ変化時にセッション状態を DB へ保存

- session.parents / firstSpeaker / firstUser の状態をログ出力
- firstSpeaker キーでまず親を取得するよう修正（A固定から改善）

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: join/memberJoined 競合によるメンション失敗を修正

根本原因:
- join と memberJoined が並行処理され、startSession が
  memberJoined のセット済み parents.A を上書きしていた

修正内容:
- join.js: setTimeoutを削除し、session.pendingStart フラグのみ立てる
- server.js: memberJoined で pendingStart 検出後 currentUserId を確定させ
  3秒後に startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget を呼ぶ
- startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget: pushQuickText → pushQuickMention に変更
  (session.currentUserId/currentUserName を利用)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: join/memberJoined 並行競合によるメンション失敗の根本修正

原因:
- join と memberJoined は別 HTTP リクエストで並行処理される
- memberJoined が parents.A をセット後、join が session.parents を
  {A:null,B:null} で上書きするため parents.A が消える
- かつ memberJoined が pendingStart を確認した時点でまだ false

修正:
1. join.js: session.parents をすでに存在する場合は上書きしない
   (memberJoined が先にセット済みなら保持)
2. server.js: handleJoin 完了後に parents.A がセット済みかチェックし
   pendingStart=true なら即座にシナリオ開始タイマーを起動

これにより join/memberJoined どちらが先でもメンション付き送信が機能する

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

* fix: 初回シナリオ開始を startFirstSceneByPush に統一し文言を修正

- startFirstSceneByPushWithTarget は「2人目ターン開始」専用に限定
  (「お待たせしたにゃ。次はあなたの番だにゃ」)
- join/memberJoined の初回シナリオ開始は startFirstSceneByPush を使用
  (「じゃあ、さっそくひとつ聞いてみるにゃ」)
- startFirstSceneByPush のユーザー解決を session.currentUserId/Name 優先に変更
  (server.js で事前セット済みの値を活用、parentsへのフォールバックも保持)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

LINE APIの制限: quickReply.items[].action.label は20文字以内
Claude APIが生成する選択肢テキストが超過することがあるため
replyQuick.js と pushQuick.js で substring(0, 20) を適用
(pushQuickMention.js は既に対応済み)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MrKbmjNmnqXJPg1qFWVv41

commit.message:
Fix 503 errors: increase gateway timeout for intelligence service to 120s

Root cause: gateway timelimiter was 15s and circuit breaker slowCallThreshold
was 5s. AI chat (Claude/OpenAI) and voice transcription (Groq Whisper) calls
routinely take 10-60 seconds. Gateway was killing these requests and the
circuit breaker was opening after repeated "slow" calls, causing cascading 503s.

- intelligenceService timelimiter: 15s → 120s
- intelligenceService circuit breaker slowCallDurationThreshold: 5s → 60s
- intelligenceService failureRateThreshold: 50% → 80%
- intelligenceService slidingWindowSize: 50 → 100

fix: comprehensive security hardening and coc-sync audit (#660)

Security fixes:
- SQL injection: parameterized all f-string SQL queries in user management demos
- Code injection: replaced exec()/eval() with ast.parse/json.loads in 5 docs
- PythonCodeNode injection: converted f-string code interpolation to ParameterNode pattern in 4 files
- Removed asyncio.execute() (nonexistent API) → asyncio.run() in 16 files

Contamination cleanup:
- Removed sys.path.insert hacks from 55 sdk-users/ Python files
- Replaced tests/utils/test-env refs with docker compose in 8 files
- Added output.txt to .gitignore

Language softening (COC template):
- Softened e2e-god-mode.md: MUST NOT → Avoid, NO EXCEPTIONS → softened
- Softened env-models.md: NO EXCEPTIONS → standard exceptions
- Softened tdd-implementer.md: !!!ALWAYS!!! → calm directives
- Softened 5 downstream files: NEVER/MANDATORY/Forbidden → Avoid/Recommended/Discouraged
- Softened 3 sdk-users/ files: MANDATORY → Recommended

Full coc-sync audit:
- 411 .claude/ files compared, 220 match, 184 properly transformed
- Zero missing files, zero orphaned files
- All contamination patterns clean (src/kailash/, apps/kailash-*, absolute paths)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add TypedNull wrapper for R2DBC null binding with type info (#23)

R2DBC's bindNull(index, Class) requires an explicit Java type, but
ParameterMapper.mapParameters() returned Map<String, Any?> where nulls
carried no type info. The compiler plugin now emits TypedNull(kClass)
instead of bare null for nullable properties, so the R2DBC binding layer
can extract type information for proper null binding.

commit.message:
fix: chat FAB badge shows stale count — wire to authoritative unread state

FloatingChatButton computed its own unreadCount by checking whether the
last message in each conversation came from someone else. This had no
concept of "read" — it counted any conversation where the last sender
wasn't the current user as unread, permanently, even after reading it.

Fix:
- Add unreadChatCount + setUnreadChatCount to AppContext
- chat.tsx syncs unreadConversations.size to AppContext via useEffect
  whenever the Set changes (new message detected, chat opened, etc.)
- FloatingChatButton now reads unreadChatCount from AppContext instead
  of doing its own flawed computation

commit.message:
Code review & simplification: consolidate duplicated utilities

## Reuse Improvements
- Consolidate 26 system ID format instances → formatSystemLabel()
- Extract anomaly tier color mapping → getAnomalyTierColor()
- Extract ID-to-label formatting → formatIdAsLabel()
- Use existing formatCostString() in UI cost displays (4 locations)
- Add hasAdjacentControlled() utility for system checks

## Performance Improvements
- Replace JSON.stringify/parse undo snapshots with shallow object copies
- 20-50x faster snapshot/restore cycles
- Avoid expensive serialization on every action

## Code Quality
- Add utility functions: clamp(), formatIdAsLabel(), getAnomalyTierColor(), hasAdjacentControlled()
- Reduce magic strings and duplicated patterns across 7 files
- Centralize formatting logic in data.js

All changes verified to build successfully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: point build.rs to contracts/realizar/binding.yaml (Refs PMAT-069)

Previously pointed to contracts/aprender/binding.yaml, which was
incorrect for realizar's own 23-binding registry. Now reads the
dedicated realizar binding.yaml: 23/23 implemented (100%).

commit.message:
feat: 翻訳問題を入力採点式に変更・不正解時に類似問題2問を自動追加

- 日→英 翻訳問題（trans型）を入力フィールドで採点する形式に変更
- 翻訳問題も不正解時に苦手リストへ自動追加
- 不正解時に同フレーズの類似問題2問を苦手リストへ追加（紫色「類似問題」ラベル）
- 類似問題もシャッフル対象・正解で削除される
- スコア集計にtrans型を追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 更新Python版本为3.8+

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move AI summary to top-left, longer with source references

Repositioned the AI briefing box from bottom-center (hidden behind
legend) to top-left of the map. Updated prompt to produce 3-4
sentences (up to 100 words) with source attribution (e.g.
"according to BBC News"). Increased max tokens to 250.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: copier recopy to template v1.6.2

Strip BOM from .copier-answers.yml and align with template v1.6.2.

repository.name: git-statuz
repository.description: Windows-first PySide6 desktop viewer for Git status, diffs, and commit history.

commit.message:
fix: remove channel button now removes channel instead of closing drawer

The @remove-channel handler was incorrectly bound to handleChannelSearch
which closed the panel. Fixed by exporting removeChannel from useAppState
and binding it correctly in App.vue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(transactions,holdings): agregar filtros en movimientos y tenencias

- TransactionList: filtros por búsqueda, tipo, moneda y mes
- HoldingsList: filtros por búsqueda, moneda, producto y toggle sin actualizar
- Totales dinámicos según filtro activo en movimientos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 縮小標籤圖片比例避免底部條碼被截斷

width 從 200% 調整為 190%，確保完整標籤含條碼都在 10x15cm 範圍內

docs: update README with evolution engine documentation

Add Evolution Engine section to both Chinese and English README:
- Four mechanisms explained: fitness tracking, epigenetic adaptation,
  group genome (speciation), immune system
- Updated architecture diagram to include immune system + evolution daemon
- Updated feature list and philosophy sections
- Updated project structure tree with host/evolution/ package
- Updated security section with immune system entry

commit.message:
feat: add build.rs for provable-contracts binding verification (Refs #252)

Reads ../provable-contracts/contracts/entrenar/binding.yaml and emits
CONTRACT_* env vars consumed by the #[contract] proc macro. Uses
WarnOnGaps policy: 81/96 implemented, 3 partial, 12 gaps.
